rules.content: (?:in der Beschwerdesache|in der Verwaltungsstrafsache|in der S\u00e4umnisbeschwerdesache|in der Revisionssache|in der Rechtssache)\s+([A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+(?:\s+(?:von|van|de|zu|im|am|in)\s+[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+)*(?:\s+[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+)*)

rules.name: sentence_start_names
rules.description: Matches names at the start of a sentence or paragraph, often followed by a comma or 'in der Folge'.

rules.name: die_name_context
rules.description: Matches names following 'Die' (e.g., 'Die Heike Osteroth').

rules.name: academic_and_professional_titles
rules.description: Matches names preceded by academic titles. Handles multiple consecutive titles (e.g., 'Hon.-Prof.in Mag.a').
rules.content: (?:Dr\.|Dr\.in|Mag\.|Mag\.a|Univ\.-Prof\.|Univ\.-Prof\.in|Priv\.-Doz\.|Priv\.-Doz\.in|Hon\.-Prof\.|Hon\.-Prof\.in|Ing\.|VetR|OMedR|RgR|StR|\u00d6kR|KommR|MedR|PhD|MSc|BEd|LLB|LLM|Bakk\. art\.|Bakk\. rer\. nat\.|Bakk\. art\. MA|Bakk\. rer\. nat\. MBA|Techn R)(?:\s+(?:Dr\.|Dr\.in|Mag\.|Mag\.a|Univ\.-Prof\.|Univ\.-Prof\.in|Priv\.-Doz\.|Priv\.-Doz\.in|Hon\.-Prof\.|Hon\.-Prof\.in|Ing\.|VetR|OMedR|RgR|StR|\u00d6kR|KommR|MedR|PhD|MSc|BEd|LLB|LLM|Bakk\. art\.|Bakk\. rer\. nat\.|Bakk\. art\. MA|Bakk\. rer\. nat\. MBA|Techn R))*\s+([A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+(?:\s+(?:von|van|de|zu|im|am|in)\s+[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+)*(?:\s+[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+)*)

rules.name: generic_honorifics
rules.description: Matches names preceded by 'Frau' or 'Herr'. Requires at least two words to avoid single-word false positives.

rules.name: role_based_identification
rules.description: Matches names following role indicators like 'Richter', 'Richterin', etc. EXCLUDES the judge's name if followed by 'in der Beschwerdesache'. Captures the name only if it's not the judge in a case context.
rules.content: (?:durch den Richter|durch die Richterin|durch die Senatsvorsitzende|durch den Schriftführer|durch den Liquidator|durch den Masseverwalter)\s+(?:Dr\.|Dr\.in|Mag\.|Mag\.a|Univ\.-Prof\.|Univ\.-Prof\.in|Priv\.-Doz\.|Priv\.-Doz\.in|Hon\.-Prof\.|Hon\.-Prof\.in|Ing\.|VetR|OMedR|RgR|StR|\u00d6kR|KommR|MedR|PhD|MSc|BEd|LLB|LLM|Bakk\. art\.|Bakk\. rer\. nat\.|Bakk\. art\. MA|Bakk\. rer\. nat\. MBA|Techn R)?\s+([A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+(?:\s+(?:von|van|de|zu|im|am|in)\s+[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+)*(?:\s+[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+)*)\s*(?!in der Beschwerdesache)

rules.name: name_in_comma_list
rules.description: Matches names appearing after a comma in a list or appositive context, e.g., 'Beschwerdef\u00fchrer, Alan Faltinat'.

rules.name: party_in_complaint_context
rules.description: Matches names following 'in der Beschwerdesache' or 'gegen die Beschwerde' when no title is present and no address comma follows immediately (e.g., end of sentence or different context).
rules.content: (?:in\s+der\s+|im\s+|in\s+der)\s+(?:der\s+)?(?:Beschwerdesache|Rechtsmittelsache|Rechtssache|Revisionssache)\s+(?!.*\s*,\s*[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+\s*,)(?:Dr\.|Dr\.in|Mag\.|Mag\.a|Univ\.-Prof\.|Univ\.-Prof\.in|Priv\.-Doz\.|Priv\.-Doz\.in|Hon\.-Prof\.|Hon\.-Prof\.in|Ing\.|VetR|OMedR|RgR|StR|\u00d6kR|KommR|MedR|PhD|MSc|BEd|LLB|LLM|Bakk\. art\.|Bakk\. rer\. nat\.|Bakk\. art\. MA|Bakk\. rer\. nat\. MBA|Techn R|HR|Prof\.in MedR|OStR)?\s+([A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+(?:\s+(?:von|van|de|zu|im|am|in)\s+[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+)*(?:\s+[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+)*)

rules.name: complaint_of_context
rules.description: Matches names following 'Beschwerde des' or 'Beschwerde der' (genitive) to capture parties like 'Gotthard Xenopoulos'.

rules.name: family_member_context
rules.description: Matches names following prepositions like 'für den', 'von', 'für das' in contexts like 'für den Werner Hoop'.

rules.name: party_in_complaint_context_no_address
rules.description: Matches names following 'in der Beschwerdesache' when the name is not followed by a comma (address) but by a different context (e.g., end of sentence, 'vertreten durch').
rules.content: (?:in\s+der\s+|im\s+|in\s+der)\s+(?:der\s+)?(?:Beschwerdesache|Rechtsmittelsache|Rechtssache|Revisionssache)\s+(?:Dr\.|Dr\.in|Mag\.|Mag\.a|Univ\.-Prof\.|Univ\.-Prof\.in|Priv\.-Doz\.|Priv\.-Doz\.in|Hon\.-Prof\.|Hon\.-Prof\.in|Ing\.|VetR|OMedR|RgR|StR|\u00d6kR|KommR|MedR|PhD|MSc|BEd|LLB|LLM|Bakk\. art\.|Bakk\. rer\. nat\.|Bakk\. art\. MA|Bakk\. rer\. nat\. MBA|Techn R|HR|Prof\.in MedR|OStR)?\s+([A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+(?:\s+(?:von|van|de|zu|im|am|in)\s+[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+)*(?:\s+[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+)*)\s+(?:,|\s+(?:vertreten|durch|vom|gegen|betreffend|zu\s+Recht))

rules.name: academic_and_professional_titles
rules.description: Matches names preceded by academic and professional titles. TIGHTENED to exclude judges (preceded by role) and parties in complaint cases (followed by address). Added negative lookbehind for 'Richter', 'Richterin', 'vertreten durch'.
rules.content: (?:^|\s)(?!(?:Richter|Richterin|Senatsvorsitzender|Senatsvorsitzende|fachkundige\s+Laienrichter|fachkundige\s+Laienrichterin|vertreten\s+durch)\s+)(?:Dr\.|Dr\.in|Mag\.|Mag\.a|Univ\.-Prof\.|Univ\.-Prof\.in|Priv\.-Doz\.|Priv\.-Doz\.in|Hon\.-Prof\.|Hon\.-Prof\.in|Ing\.|VetR|OMedR|RgR|StR|\u00d6kR|KommR|MedR|PhD|MSc|BEd|LLB|LLM|Bakk\. art\.|Bakk\. rer\. nat\.|Bakk\. art\. MA|Bakk\. rer\. nat\. MBA|Techn R|HR|Prof\.in MedR)(?:\s+(?:Dr\.|Dr\.in|Mag\.|Mag\.a|Univ\.-Prof\.|Univ\.-Prof\.in|Priv\.-Doz\.|Priv\.-Doz\.in|Hon\.-Prof\.|Hon\.-Prof\.in|Ing\.|VetR|OMedR|RgR|StR|\u00d6kR|KommR|MedR|PhD|MSc|BEd|LLB|LLM|Bakk\. art\.|Bakk\. rer\. nat\.|Bakk\. art\. MA|Bakk\. rer\. nat\. MBA|Techn R|HR|Prof\.in MedR))*\s+[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+(?:\s+(?:von|van|de|zu|im|am|in)\s+[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+)*(?:\s+[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+)*(?!\s*,\s*[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+\s*,)

rules.name: generic_honorifics
rules.description: Matches names preceded by 'Frau' or 'Herr'. Requires at least two words to avoid single-word false positives. Added 'Herrn' for dative case.

rules.name: role_based_identification
rules.description: Matches names following role indicators like 'Richter', 'Richterin'. Captures the full name including title and suffixes.

rules.name: herrn_context
rules.description: Matches names preceded by 'Herrn' or 'Herr'. Strictly stops at the first comma or non-name word to avoid capturing addresses.

rules.name: party_names_in_context
rules.description: Matches names appearing after 'der' (genitive) or 'die' (accusative) in contexts like 'der Beschwerde der [Name]', 'die Beschwerde der [Name]'. Improved to handle multi-word names and stop at non-name characters.

MA|Bakk\. rer\. nat\. MBA|Techn R)?\s+([A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+(?:\s+(?:von|van|de|zu|im|am|in)\s+[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+)*(?:\s+[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+)*)

rules.name: herrn_context
rules.description: Matches names preceded by 'Herrn' or 'Herr'. Strictly stops at the first comma or non-name word to avoid capturing addresses.

rules.name: beschwerdesache_names
rules.description: Matches names appearing immediately after 'in der Beschwerdesache'. Updated to capture names WITH titles AND names WITHOUT titles. Stops at the address comma.
rules.content: (?:in\s+der\s+|im\s+|in\s+der)\s+(?:der\s+)?(?:Beschwerdesache|Rechtsmittelsache|Rechtssache|Revisionssache)\s+(?:(?:Dr\.|Dr\.in|Mag\.|Mag\.a|Univ\.-Prof\.|Univ\.-Prof\.in|Priv\.-Doz\.|Priv\.-Doz\.in|Hon\.-Prof\.|Hon\.-Prof\.in|Ing\.|VetR|OMedR|RgR|StR|\u00d6kR|KommR|MedR|PhD|MSc|BEd|LLB|LLM|Bakk\. art\.|Bakk\. rer\. nat\.|Bakk\. art\. MA|Bakk\. rer\. nat\. MBA|Techn R|HR|Prof\.in MedR|OStR|KzlR|DDr\.in|DDr\.)\s+)?([A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+(?:\s+(?:von|van|de|zu|im|am|in)\s+[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+)*(?:\s+[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+)*)\s*(?=,\s*\d|,\s*[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+\s*,|\s*$|\s+(?:vertreten|durch|als))

rules.name: representative_names
rules.description: Matches names following 'vertreten durch' (represented by) to capture legal representatives.
rules.content: vertreten\s+durch\s+(?:die\s+)?(?:Dr\.|Dr\.in|Mag\.|Mag\.a|Univ\.-Prof\.|Univ\.-Prof\.in|Priv\.-Doz\.|Priv\.-Doz\.in|Hon\.-Prof\.|Hon\.-Prof\.in|Ing\.|VetR|OMedR|RgR|StR|\u00d6kR|KommR|MedR|PhD|MSc|BEd|LLB|LLM|Bakk\. art\.|Bakk\. rer\. nat\.|Bakk\. art\. MA|Bakk\. rer\. nat\. MBA|Techn R)?\s+([A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+(?:\s+(?:von|van|de|zu|im|am|in)\s+[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+)*(?:\s+[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+)*)

rules.name: party_names_in_context
rules.description: Matches names appearing after 'der' (genitive) or 'die' (accusative) in contexts like 'der Beschwerde der [Name]', 'die Beschwerde der [Name]'. Improved to handle multi-word names and stop at non-name characters.

rules.name: generic_preposition_names
rules.description: Matches names following common prepositions or in 'in der Sache' contexts where the name is the first entity. Catches cases like 'der Beschwerde der [Name]' or 'in der Beschwerdesache [Name]' (if not caught by specific header rule).
rules.content: (?:der|die)\s+(?:Beschwerde|Rechtsmittel|Antrag)\s+(?:der|des)\s+(?:Dr\.|Dr\.in|Mag\.|Mag\.a|Univ\.-Prof\.|Univ\.-Prof\.in|Priv\.-Doz\.|Priv\.-Doz\.in|Hon\.-Prof\.|Hon\.-Prof\.in|Ing\.|VetR|OMedR|RgR|StR|\u00d6kR|KommR|MedR|PhD|MSc|BEd|LLB|LLM|Bakk\. art\.|Bakk\. rer\. nat\.|Bakk\. art\. MA|Bakk\. rer\. nat\. MBA|Techn R|HR|Prof\.in MedR|OStR)?\s+(?:Dr\.|Dr\.in|Mag\.|Mag\.a|Univ\.-Prof\.|Univ\.-Prof\.in|Priv\.-Doz\.|Priv\.-Doz\.in|Hon\.-Prof\.|Hon\.-Prof\.in|Ing\.|VetR|OMedR|RgR|StR|\u00d6kR|KommR|MedR|PhD|MSc|BEd|LLB|LLM|Bakk\. art\.|Bakk\. rer\. nat\.|Bakk\. art\. MA|Bakk\. rer\. nat\. MBA|Techn R|HR|Prof\.in MedR|OStR)?\s+([A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+(?:\s+(?:von|van|de|zu|im|am|in)\s+[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+)*(?:\s+[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+)*(?:\s*,\s*[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+)*)

rules.name: greeting_names
rules.description: Matches names appearing after standard German legal greetings like 'Mit freundlichen Grüßen'.

rules.name: name_after_comma_in_list
rules.description: Matches names appearing after a comma in a list or appositive context. TIGHTENED to exclude non-person words like 'Straße', 'Medizin', 'Zeugnis', 'Befund', 'Deutschland', 'Österreich', 'Abgabenstrafbehörde'.

rules.name: techn_hr_title
rules.description: Specifically matches the 'Techn R HR' title pattern found in training data, which is not covered by generic titles.

rules.name: name_in_comma_list
rules.description: Matches names appearing after a comma in a list or appositive context, e.g., 'Beschwerdef\u00fchrer, Alan Faltinat'.

rules.name: party_in_complaint_context
rules.description: Matches names following 'in der Beschwerdesache' or similar contexts. STRICTLY stops before address patterns (comma + number).
rules.content: (?:in\s+der\s+|im\s+|in\s+der)\s+(?:der\s+)?(?:Beschwerdesache|Rechtsmittelsache|Rechtssache|Revisionssache)\s+(?:(?:Dr\.|Dr\.in|Mag\.|Mag\.a|Univ\.-Prof\.|Univ\.-Prof\.in|Priv\.-Doz\.|Priv\.-Doz\.in|Hon\.-Prof\.|Hon\.-Prof\.in|Ing\.|VetR|OMedR|RgR|StR|\u00d6kR|KommR|MedR|PhD|MSc|BEd|LLB|LLM|Bakk\. art\.|Bakk\. rer\. nat\.|Bakk\. art\. MA|Bakk\. rer\. nat\. MBA|Techn R|HR|Prof\.in MedR|OStR|KzlR|DDr\.in|DDr\.)\s+)?([A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+(?:\s+(?:von|van|de|zu|im|am|in)\s+[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+)*(?:\s+[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+)*)\s*(?=,\s*\d|\s*$|\s+(?:vertreten|durch|als))

rules.name: complaint_of_context
rules.description: Matches names following 'Beschwerde des' or 'Beschwerde der'. Handles multiple titles and stops before addresses.
rules.content: (?:Beschwerde|Rechtsmittel|Antrag)\s+(?:des|der)\s+(?:(?:Dr\.|Dr\.in|Mag\.|Mag\.a|Univ\.-Prof\.|Univ\.-Prof\.in|Priv\.-Doz\.|Priv\.-Doz\.in|Hon\.-Prof\.|Hon\.-Prof\.in|Ing\.|VetR|OMedR|RgR|StR|\u00d6kR|KommR|MedR|PhD|MSc|BEd|LLB|LLM|Bakk\. art\.|Bakk\. rer\. nat\.|Bakk\. art\. MA|Bakk\. rer\. nat\. MBA|Techn R|HR|Prof\.in MedR|OStR|KzlR|DDr\.in|DDr\.)\s+)+([A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+(?:\s+(?:von|van|de|zu|im|am|in)\s+[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+)*(?:\s+[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+)*)\s*(?=,\s*\d|\s*$|\s+(?:vertreten|durch|als))

rules.name: party_name_with_title
rules.description: Specifically matches party names that start with a title (like KzlR, DDr.in) in the 'Beschwerdesache' context, ensuring the title is part of the match if it precedes the name.

rules.name: academic_and_professional_titles
rules.description: Matches names preceded by one or more academic/professional titles. Handles multiple consecutive titles (e.g., 'RgR Dipl. Kff.', 'VetR OMedR'). Stops before addresses.
rules.content: (?<!\S)(?!(?:Richter|Richterin|Senatsvorsitzender|Senatsvorsitzende|fachkundige\s+Laienrichter|fachkundige\s+Laienrichterin|vertreten\s+durch)\s+)(?:(?:Dr\.|Dr\.in|Mag\.|Mag\.a|Univ\.-Prof\.|Univ\.-Prof\.in|Priv\.-Doz\.|Priv\.-Doz\.in|Hon\.-Prof\.|Hon\.-Prof\.in|Ing\.|VetR|OMedR|RgR|StR|\u00d6kR|KommR|MedR|PhD|MSc|BEd|LLB|LLM|Bakk\. art\.|Bakk\. rer\. nat\.|Bakk\. art\. MA|Bakk\. rer\. nat\. MBA|Techn R|HR|Prof\.in MedR|OStR|KzlR|DDr\.in|DDr\.)\s+)+([A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+(?:\s+(?:von|van|de|zu|im|am|in)\s+[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+)*(?:\s+[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+)*)

rules.name: name_with_suffix_no_title
rules.description: Matches names with suffixes (e.g., BA, LLB, Bakk. techn.) when no title is present, specifically in contexts like 'vertreten durch' or list items. Tightened to capture full suffix and avoid street names.

rules.name: name_as_role
rules.description: Matches names appearing after 'als' (as) followed by a role. STRICTLY excludes common job titles and legal roles that are not names. REMOVED: This rule was causing false positives by matching the role itself (e.g., 'Abgabenstrafbehörde'). Replaced by more specific context rules.

rules.name: name_after_born
rules.description: Matches names appearing after 'geboren am' (born on) to capture parents or individuals mentioned in birth contexts.

rules.name: genitive_party_name
rules.description: Matches names in genitive contexts like 'des [Name]' or 'der [Name]' when not preceded by specific headers like 'Beschwerdesache'. FIXED: Excludes 'Beschwerdesache' context and stops before addresses.

rules.name: generic_honorifics
rules.description: Matches names preceded by 'Frau' or 'Herr'. Requires at least two words to avoid single-word false positives. Extended to capture suffixes like 'BA LLB'. TIGHTENED to avoid matching partial titles like 'Vet'.

rules.name: party_in_complaint_context_no_address
rules.description: Matches names following 'in der Beschwerdesache' or similar contexts. FIXED: Ensures strict stopping before address (comma + number/street).
rules.content: (?:in\s+der\s+|im\s+|in\s+der)\s+(?:der\s+)?(?:Beschwerdesache|Rechtsmittelsache|Rechtssache|Revisionssache)\s+(?:(?:Dr\.|Dr\.in|Mag\.|Mag\.a|Univ\.-Prof\.|Univ\.-Prof\.in|Priv\.-Doz\.|Priv\.-Doz\.in|Hon\.-Prof\.|Hon\.-Prof\.in|Ing\.|VetR|OMedR|RgR|StR|\u00d6kR|KommR|MedR|PhD|MSc|BEd|LLB|LLM|Bakk\. art\.|Bakk\. rer\. nat\.|Bakk\. art\. MA|Bakk\. rer\. nat\. MBA|Techn R|HR|Prof\.in MedR|OStR|KzlR|DDr\.in|DDr\.)\s+)?([A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+(?:\s+(?:von|van|de|zu|im|am|in)\s+[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+)*(?:\s+[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+)*(?:\s*,\s*[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+)*(?:\s*,\s*[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+)*)\s*(?=,\s*\d|,\s*[A-Z][a-z\u00e4\u00f6\u00fc\u00df]+\s*,|\s*$|\s+(?:vertreten|durch|als))

rules.name: beschwerdesache_party_name
rules.description: Matches party names appearing immediately after 'in der Beschwerdesache' or 'der Beschwerdesache'. Captures names with or without titles, stopping strictly before the address (comma + number).
